title: Dagobian frog tadpole
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Dagobian frog tadpoles''' were creatures from [[Dagobah/Legends|Dagobah]].

In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] saw an image on a computer screen that reminded her of these creatures.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' {{Mo}}
